title: EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Companion
notes:
We’re continuing to make improvements to the Companion App. 
In this patch we:

- Fixed an unresponsive button when claiming Rivals rewards.
- Added a back arrow when accessing Evos on landscape devices.
- Expired Evo slots no longer hidden if there are unclaimed rewards.
- Fixed the locked team filter for Squad Builder in SBCs.
- Fixed sorting options for players in Evos.

- The Companion Team

title: War Robots: Multiplayer Game
notes:
WORLD IRON CUP: A new trial of mettle, raw strength, and iron will by DSC!
VULCAN: Forge this robot's upgrade in the heat of a battle!
ULTIMATE MUROMETZ: The sky rains non-stop fire barrages!
NEW PAINTJOBS: Skyros and Ochokochi stand ready for a new round of Soccer Punch!
SHENZHEN SPECIAL EDITION: Step onto a completely new kind of turf!
